ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "participant_number" INTEGER /* Participant's numerical ID */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Participant's age */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Participant's gender */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Participant's ethnicity */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Participant's occupation */,
  "native_language" TEXT /* Participant's native language */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for participant creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for participant update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "task_code" TEXT /* Code representing the task */,
  "task_description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "task_type" TEXT /* Type of task (categorization, recognition, etc.) */,
  "instructions" TEXT /* Detailed instructions for the task */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for task creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for task update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stimuli" (
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stimulus */,
  "stimulus_image" TEXT /* File path to the stimulus image */,
  "category" TEXT /* High-level category of the stimulus */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Low-level category of the stimulus */,
  "stimulus_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the stimulus */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for stimulus creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for stimulus update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stimulus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant responding */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task being performed */,
  "stimulus_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stimulus presented */,
  "correct_answer" TEXT /* The correct answer for the task */,
  "correct_answer_num" INTEGER /* Numerical representation of the correct answer */,
  "response_type" INTEGER /* Type of response (0 for incorrect, 1 for correct) */,
  "reaction_time" REAL /* Time taken to respond in seconds */,
  "condition" INTEGER /* Condition under which the response was recorded */,
  "recognition_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of recognition (1 for correct, 0 for incorrect) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the participant in their answer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for response creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for response update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_stimulus_id FOREIGN KEY ("stimulus_id") REFERENCES stimuli ("stimulus_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_condition FOREIGN KEY ("condition") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experimental condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "condition_type" TEXT /* Type of condition (control, experimental, etc.) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for condition creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for condition update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trial_data" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "response_id" INTEGER /* ID of the response that corresponds to the trial */,
  "trial_number" INTEGER /* Trial number in the sequence of the task */,
  "trial_sequence" TEXT /* Sequence of trials (randomized, counterbalanced, etc.) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for trial creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for trial update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trial_data_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES responses ("response_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "image_assets" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image asset */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path for the image asset */,
  "image_category" TEXT /* High-level category of the image asset */,
  "image_subcategory" TEXT /* Low-level category of the image asset */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the image asset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for image asset creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for image asset update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address associated with the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (admin, researcher, analyst, etc.) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for user creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for user update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with access */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table with access */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (read, write, delete, etc.) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for access creation */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for access update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
